summary: Avelumab has received FDA approval for treating patients with locally advanced or metastatic urothelial carcinoma, based on documented clinical trials demonstrating significant therapeutic benefit. It functions effectively within immunotherapeutic regimens targeting PD-L1 pathways in such cancers.
